title: cyrtogonium virens
intro: Cyrtogonium virens, also known as the green spleenwort, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyrtogonium virens include its ability to aid in the reduction of fever, relief from respiratory issues, and its potential to help lower blood pressure. The herbal preparations of Cyrtogonium virens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent.
